---
title: "crmPack Training for Merck"
subtitle: "Advanced Training"
author: "Daniel Sabanés Bové"
part: 2
description: "Advanced training for crmPack users at Merck."
image: /figures/illustration/refatoring_Antoni-Shkraba.jpg
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(emoji)
library(rpact)
```

## Advanced Training Outline `r emoji("package")`

::::: columns
::: {.column width="70%"}
- Mixture priors
- Time-to-event (TITE) designs
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![](/figures/logos/crmPack_logo.png){height="150px"}
:::
:::::

## References
